title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 376.1032 - Plan considered insurer, when
text:
376.1032.  Plan considered insurer, when. — For the purposes of sections 375.930 to 375.948 and sections 375.1000 to 375.1018, a multiple employer self-insured health plan shall be considered an "insurer".
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 § 35)
